originContent: # NotebookLM Pro Tree
translatedContent: # NotebookLM Pro Tree

originContent: A Chrome extension that transforms Google's NotebookLM from a simple list into a robust Project Management Dashboard.
translatedContent: A Chrome extension that transforms Google's NotebookLM from a simple list into a robust Project Management Dashboard.

originContent: Stop scrolling through endless flat lists. Organize your sources into nested trees, manage complex projects with advanced tasks, multi-window workflows, and focus with Zen Mode.
translatedContent: Stop scrolling through endless flat lists. Organize your sources into nested trees, manage complex projects with advanced tasks, multi-window workflows, and focus with Zen Mode.
## Critical Warnings ⚠️

originContent: ## Critical Warnings ⚠️
translatedContent: Uninstalling Deletes Data: This extension uses Local Storage for privacy and speed. If you remove/uninstall the extension, your folders and tasks will be deleted instantly by Chrome.

originContent: Uninstalling Deletes Data: This extension uses Local Storage for privacy and speed. If you remove/uninstall the extension, your folders and tasks will be deleted instantly by Chrome.
translatedContent: Solution: Always use the Export button to save a backup JSON file before reinstalling or moving to a new computer.

originContent: Solution: Always use the Export button to save a backup JSON file before reinstalling or moving to a new computer.
translatedContent: Google Updates & Reliability: This extension works by "reading" the NotebookLM website. If Google updates their website, this extension may break.

originContent: Google Updates & Reliability: This extension works by "reading" the NotebookLM website. If Google updates their website, this extension may break.
translatedContent: Disclaimer: As this is a free, open-source project maintained in my spare time, I cannot guarantee immediate fixes if Google changes their code. Use this tool as a helpful enhancement, but keep your important data backed up.

originContent: Disclaimer: As this is a free, open-source project maintained in my spare time, I cannot guarantee immediate fixes if Google changes their code. Use this tool as a helpful enhancement, but keep your important data backed up.
translatedContent: ## Project Status & Disclaimer 🚧
Please Read: I am a Construction Project Manager, not a professional software developer. I built this tool because I needed it for my own daily workflow.

originContent: ## Project Status & Disclaimer 🚧
Please Read: I am a Construction Project Manager, not a professional software developer. I built this tool because I needed it for my own daily workflow.
translatedContent: "Works on My Machine": This update (v17.9) is stable for my personal use, but it has not been battle-tested on every possible browser configuration.

originContent: "Works on My Machine": This update (v17.9) is stable for my personal use, but it has not been battle-tested on every possible browser configuration.
translatedContent: Experimental Features: The multi-window system and DOM observers are complex. You may encounter bugs I haven't seen.

originContent: Experimental Features: The multi-window system and DOM observers are complex. You may encounter bugs I haven't seen.
translatedContent: Feedback: If you find a bug, please open an issue on GitHub!

originContent: Feedback: If you find a bug, please open an issue on GitHub!
translatedContent: ## New in v17.9: The Productivity Suite 🚀
Transformed NotebookLM into a multi-window workspace. This update (consolidating v17.6–v17.9) brings major workflow improvements:

originContent: ## New in v17.9: The Productivity Suite 🚀
Transformed NotebookLM into a multi-window workspace. This update (consolidating v17.6–v17.9) brings major workflow improvements:
translatedContent: Pop-out Notes: Open any note in a floating window for side-by-side reference while you write. The pop-outs preserve formatting (read-only) and sync with your Light/Dark theme.

originContent: Pop-out Notes: Open any note in a floating window for side-by-side reference while you write. The pop-outs preserve formatting (read-only) and sync with your Light/Dark theme.
translatedContent: Smart Tasks & Quick Capture: Select text in any note to instantly see a "Create Task" button. This creates a task linked directly to that source note.

originContent: Smart Tasks & Quick Capture: Select text in any note to instantly see a "Create Task" button. This creates a task linked directly to that source note.
translatedContent: Advanced Task Management: Organize tasks into Custom Sections (collapsible groups), add Due Dates with quick-select options, and include rich Descriptions.

originContent: Advanced Task Management: Organize tasks into Custom Sections (collapsible groups), add Due Dates with quick-select options, and include rich Descriptions.
translatedContent: Graceful Stability: A new self-healing engine that disables specific broken features individually instead of crashing the whole extension if Google updates their code.

originContent: Graceful Stability: A new self-healing engine that disables specific broken features individually instead of crashing the whole extension if Google updates their code.
translatedContent: ## Features
**Productivity & Workflow** 📋

originContent: ## Features
**Productivity & Workflow** 📋
*   **Multi-Window Workflow** — Click the "Pop-out" icon on any note in the Studio panel to open it in a separate window. Perfect for dual-monitor setups.
translatedContent: *   **Multi-Window Workflow** — Click the "Pop-out" icon on any note in the Studio panel to open it in a separate window. Perfect for dual-monitor setups.

originContent: *   **Integrated Task Manager** — A complete project management tool built right into the interface:
translatedContent: *   **Integrated Task Manager** — A complete project management tool built right into the interface:

originContent: *   **Sections:** Group tasks by phase (e.g., "Research," "Drafting," "Review").
translatedContent: *   **Sections:** Group tasks by phase (e.g., "Research," "Drafting," "Review").

originContent: *   **Smart Links:** Tasks created from notes include a "Link" icon that filters your view to the original source.
translatedContent: *   **Smart Links:** Tasks created from notes include a "Link" icon that filters your view to the original source.

originContent: *   **Priorities:** Flag tasks (Red/Yellow/Blue) and sort by Priority or Due Date.
translatedContent: *   **Priorities:** Flag tasks (Red/Yellow/Blue) and sort by Priority or Due Date.

originContent: *   **"Zen Mode"** — Toggle the UI to hide the AI chat and sidebars for a distraction-free reading/writing studio.
translatedContent: *   **"Zen Mode"** — Toggle the UI to hide the AI chat and sidebars for a distraction-free reading/writing studio.

originContent: **Organization** 📂
translatedContent: **Organization** 📂

originContent: *   **Nested Folders** — Create deep structures for Sources, Notes, and Generated Artifacts (Audio Overviews, FAQs, etc.).
translatedContent: *   **Nested Folders** — Create deep structures for Sources, Notes, and Generated Artifacts (Audio Overviews, FAQs, etc.).

originContent: *   **Pinning** — Keep critical contracts or specs pinned to the top of your lists.
translatedContent: *   **Pinning** — Keep critical contracts or specs pinned to the top of your lists.

originContent: *   **Color Coding** — Assign colors to folders for visual organization.
translatedContent: *   **Color Coding** — Assign colors to folders for visual organization.

originContent: *   **Bulk Select** — Master checkboxes to select/deselect all sources in a folder or the entire notebook instantly.
translatedContent: *   **Bulk Select** — Master checkboxes to select/deselect all sources in a folder or the entire notebook instantly.

originContent: **Deep Search** 🔍
translatedContent: **Deep Search** 🔍

originContent: *   **Content Indexing** — Search the actual text inside your notes, not just the titles.
translatedContent: *   **Content Indexing** — Search the actual text inside your notes, not just the titles.

originContent: > **Note:** Indexing happens passively when you open a note.
translatedContent: > **Note:** Indexing happens passively when you open a note.

originContent: *   **Smart Compression** — Uses LZ-String compression to store up to 5MB of search index data locally without impacting performance.
translatedContent: *   **Smart Compression** — Uses LZ-String compression to store up to 5MB of search index data locally without impacting performance.

originContent: **Reliability** 🛡️
translatedContent: **Reliability** 🛡️

originContent: *   **Local-First Architecture** — Zero network latency. All data lives on your device.
translatedContent: *   **Local-First Architecture** — Zero network latency. All data lives on your device.

originContent: *   **Graceful Degradation** — If a feature fails due to a website update, the rest of the extension keeps working.
translatedContent: *   **Graceful Degradation** — If a feature fails due to a website update, the rest of the extension keeps working.

originContent: *   **Styled Dialogs** — Smooth, themed confirmation dialogs (no more jarring browser popups).
translatedContent: *   **Styled Dialogs** — Smooth, themed confirmation dialogs (no more jarring browser popups).

originContent: > **Note:** Each notebook has its own independent data. Tasks and Folders created in "Project A" won't clutter "Project B."
translatedContent: > **Note:** Each notebook has its own independent data. Tasks and Folders created in "Project A" won't clutter "Project B."
## Installation
### Load Unpacked (Developer Mode)

originContent: ## Installation
### Load Unpacked (Developer Mode)
translatedContent: 1.  Download or clone this repository.
2.  Open Chrome and go to `chrome://extensions`.

originContent: 1.  Download or clone this repository.
translatedContent: 3.  Enable **Developer mode** (toggle in top right).

originContent: 2.  Open Chrome and go to `chrome://extensions`.
translatedContent: 4.  Click **Load unpacked**.

originContent: 3.  Enable **Developer mode** (toggle in top right).
translatedContent: 5.  Select the folder containing these extension files.

originContent: 4.  Click **Load unpacked**.
translatedContent: 6.  Navigate to NotebookLM and start organizing!

originContent: 5.  Select the folder containing these extension files.
6.  Navigate to NotebookLM and start organizing!
translatedContent: ## Usage
Once installed, you'll see a new "Project Dashboard" interface injected into NotebookLM:

originContent: ## Usage
Once installed, you'll see a new "Project Dashboard" interface injected into NotebookLM:
translatedContent: *   **Quick Capture:** Highlight text in any note -> click the floating + button to turn it into a task.

originContent: *   **Quick Capture:** Highlight text in any note -> click the floating + button to turn it into a task.
translatedContent: *   **Pop-out:** Hover over a note in the Studio panel -> click the New Window icon.

originContent: *   **Pop-out:** Hover over a note in the Studio panel -> click the New Window icon.
translatedContent: *   **Task Details:** Click the Description icon on a task to add notes or context.

originContent: *   **Task Details:** Click the Description icon on a task to add notes or context.
translatedContent: *   **Bulk Actions:** Use the folder checkboxes to toggle multiple sources for the AI context window.

originContent: *   **Bulk Actions:** Use the folder checkboxes to toggle multiple sources for the AI context window.
translatedContent: *   **Export/Import:** Use these buttons to backup your structure or move it to a new computer.

originContent: *   **Export/Import:** Use these buttons to backup your structure or move it to a new computer.
translatedContent: ## Storage & Data Guide 💾
**Where Your Data Lives**

originContent: ## Storage & Data Guide 💾
**Where Your Data Lives**
translatedContent: Because v17.9 prioritizes speed and privacy, your data lives on your device:

originContent: Because v17.9 prioritizes speed and privacy, your data lives on your device:
translatedContent: *   **Local Storage:** Folders, Tasks, Settings, and Search Index.

originContent: *   **Local Storage:** Folders, Tasks, Settings, and Search Index.
translatedContent: *   **No Auto-Sync:** Folders do not sync automatically between computers.

originContent: *   **No Auto-Sync:** Folders do not sync automatically between computers.
translatedContent: *   **Moving Data:** To move your setup to a laptop, use the Export button to get a JSON file, then Import on the new machine.

originContent: *   **Moving Data:** To move your setup to a laptop, use the Export button to get a JSON file, then Import on the new machine.
translatedContent: > **Warning:** If you clear Chrome's "Site Data" or "Cookies," you will lose your folders. Export backups regularly.

originContent: > **Warning:** If you clear Chrome's "Site Data" or "Cookies," you will lose your folders. Export backups regularly.

translatedContent: ## Privacy & Security

originContent: ## Privacy & Security
**This extension is Local-First:**
translatedContent: **This extension is Local-First:**

originContent: *   **All data is stored in your browser's local storage.**
translatedContent: *   **All data is stored in your browser's local storage.**

originContent: *   **No analytics or usage data is sent to the developer.**
translatedContent: *   **No analytics or usage data is sent to the developer.**

originContent: *   **Open Source:** You can inspect the code to verify no data leaves your machine.
translatedContent: *   **Open Source:** You can inspect the code to verify no data leaves your machine.

originContent: See [PRIVACY_POLICY.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/benju66/Notebook-Nest/main/PRIVACY_POLICY.md) for details.
translatedContent: See [PRIVACY_POLICY.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/benju66/Notebook-Nest/main/PRIVACY_POLICY.md) for details.

originContent: ## Known Limitations
translatedContent: ## Known Limitations

originContent: *   **Pop-out Editing:** Pop-out windows are currently Read-Only. You must use the main window to edit text.
translatedContent: *   **Pop-out Editing:** Pop-out windows are currently Read-Only. You must use the main window to edit text.

originContent: *   **Underlining:** Underlining content in a note is not persistent (this is a Google NotebookLM issue, not the extension).
translatedContent: *   **Underlining:** Underlining content in a note is not persistent (this is a Google NotebookLM issue, not the extension).

originContent: *   **Incognito:** The extension's memory system is disabled in Incognito mode.
translatedContent: *   **Incognito:** The extension's memory system is disabled in Incognito mode.
